summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Japanese translation feature implementation. All core translation functionality working correctly across landing, login, and navigation pages. Language toggle flags present on all pages with proper persistence.
passed_tests: Language toggle flags appear on all tested pages (landing, login, apply)
Navigation menu items translate correctly when Japanese is selected
Landing page hero section translates to Japanese (TOP WAR → トップウォー, MODERATOR RECRUITMENT → モデレーター募集)
Login page form labels translate to Japanese (Username → ユーザー名, Password → パスワード, Login → ログイン)
Language preference persists across page navigation
Application form correctly excluded from translation (navigation translates but form content remains in English)
Protected routes (server assignments, moderator portal) properly redirect to login with translated interface
Backend API endpoints accessible and functional
Flag buttons (Great Britain for English, Japanese for Japanese) working correctly
success_percentage: Frontend: 100% - All translation features working correctly. Backend: 100% - API functional and supporting frontend translation testing.
